lines: Medicine deliveries share the freight ledger with household sureties and the names of drivers who died carrying them. Several burial debts repeat one copied hand mark.
The false entries do not erase the real road losses beside them.

choices.label: Take the ledger to Darius for judgment

questUpdate.log: The Morrow pump ledger contains false household sureties beside genuine medicine routes.

choices.label: Leave the record where it lies
